visual_notes: Material light Start Center: 'Home' header, rounded search field, pill-shaped selected 'Recent Documents' nav item with lavender highlight, circular purple filter/menu buttons, Create list (Writer/Calc/Impress/Draw/Math/Base), central welcome illustration, File/Tools/Help menu bar.
Material dark Start Center: dark background, white text, purple-filled 'Recent Documents' pill and circular buttons, same Material layout as light. Genuine dark-mode rendering (channel means ~28-33).
High-contrast Start Center: white background, black text, blue-outlined 'Recent Documents' selection and crisp control borders; Material layout preserved (channel means ~238).
Light Start Center after one Tab: keyboard-focus rectangle drawn around the 'Open File' nav button; a11y tree reports one FOCUSED PUSH_BUTTON named 'Open File'.

Light Start Center captured after a background pointer navigation toward the Templates entry (mouse_click at client 140,330). Distinct capture (SHA differs from base light); fresh profile shows the Material Home layout.

Material Writer, light: full menu bar, Material toolbar with rounded icon buttons, lavender pill paragraph-style and font dropdowns, ruler, blank Letter page, Material sidebar icon rail with purple search glyph, status bar 'Page 1 of 1'.
Material Writer, dark: black menu/toolbar chrome, purple-filled paragraph-style and font-size dropdown buttons, white page canvas, Material sidebar rail with purple search glyph.

Material Calc, light: menu bar, Material toolbar, pill Name Box (A1) with dropdown, formula bar (fx / sum / equals), column headers A-I with purple-highlighted A1, Sheet1 tab, purple fx sidebar glyph, status bar 'Sheet 1 of 1'.
Material Calc, dark: dark chrome and grid with light gridlines, purple-filled A1 Name Box dropdown, lavender A1 header selection, purple fx sidebar glyph.

function: Impress - new presentation (main window with Slides panel and Properties/Layouts deck)
visual_notes: Material Impress, light: Slides panel (slide 1 with purple selection border), Properties deck (Slide format/orientation/background/master with Material rounded dropdowns, 'Insert Image...' and 'Master View' pills, Layouts grid), slide with 'Click to add Title/Text'.

function: Impress - new presentation (main window with Slides panel and Properties/Layouts deck)
visual_notes: Material Impress, dark: dark Slides panel and Properties deck, purple-filled dropdowns and purple-selected layout tile, purple sidebar glyph, title/text placeholder slide.

function: Draw - blank drawing (main window with Pages panel and Page deck)
visual_notes: Material Draw, light: Pages panel (page thumbnail with purple border), left Material shape/tool rail, Page Properties deck (Format Letter, Orientation, Background, Margin, Master Page) with rounded dropdowns and 'Insert Image...' pill, ruler, white page.

function: Draw - blank drawing (main window with Pages panel and Page deck)
visual_notes: Material Draw, dark: dark shape/tool rail with purple-circled selection tool, dark Pages panel (purple-selected page), dark Page deck with purple-filled dropdowns and 'Insert Image...' pill, white page canvas.

function: Math - formula editor (main window with Elements deck and command input)
visual_notes: Material Math, light: Elements deck ('Unary/Binary Operators' dropdown and operator grid), formula preview canvas, command input area, Material toolbar with purple envelope/save glyphs and purple pi sidebar glyph.

function: Math - formula editor (main window with Elements deck and command input)
visual_notes: Material Math, dark: dark chrome, Elements deck with purple-filled 'Unary/Binary Operators' dropdown and purple pi sidebar glyph, white formula preview canvas, dark command input.

Material Base Database Wizard, light: 'Select database' step (purple), purple-filled 'Open an existing database file' radio, rounded 'Recently used' / 'Database' dropdowns, purple 'Open' folder pill, pill Help/Cancel buttons; 'Create a new database' disabled (no embedded HSQLDB/Firebird in the extracted payload). No database was created.

Material Base Database Wizard, dark: dark dialog, purple-filled 'Open an existing database file' radio, purple 'Open' and 'Cancel' pills, dark dropdowns; 'Create a new database' disabled. No database was created.
